action.proof_term:
intro z hz
  have hzbase : 1 ≤ 2*z := by omega
  have hzpow : 1 ≤ (2*z)^40 := one_le_pow_of_le hzbase 40
  have hsq : ((2*z)^20)^2 = (2*z)^40 := by
    rw [← pow_mul]
    norm_num
  have hbase : ((2*z)^20)^2 + 1 ≤ 2 * (2*z)^40 := by
    rw [hsq]
    omega
  calc
    ((((2*z)^20)^2 + 1)^8) ≤ (2 * (2*z)^40)^8 := by gcongr
    _ = 2^8 * ((2*z)^40)^8 := by rw [mul_pow]
    _ = 2^8 * (2*z)^320 := by rw [← pow_mul]; norm_num
    _ = 2^8 * (2^320 * z^320) := by rw [mul_pow]
    _ = (2^8 * 2^320) * z^320 := by ac_rfl
    _ = 2^328 * z^320 := by rw [← pow_add]; norm_num

    _ = 2^328 * z^320 := by rw [← pow_add]; norm_num

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
